description_long: This helmet features a smooth, rounded dome with a prominent central ridge running from front to back, giving it a futuristic and armored appearance. The front is dominated by a full-face visor area, which is deeply recessed and bordered by a black trim, providing a sleek and protective look. The sides of the helmet have circular ear covers with a raised button-like detail, and the rear includes a vertical rectangular vent for airflow. A horizontal fin or crest extends from the top rear, adding to its distinctive silhouette. The surface is finished in a metallic silver-gray color, with subtle panel lines and minimal ornamentation, suggesting a utilitarian yet advanced design.
description: A sleek, metallic silver helmet with a full-face visor, central ridge, and rear fin, featuring minimalistic details and a futuristic armored style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full-face visor, central ridge, and black trim outlining the eye area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded dome, side ear cover with circular detail, and the rear fin extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vertical rectangular vent, central ridge, and symmetrical ear covers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the dome, ear cover, and rear fin, with visible vent slits at the lower back.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: One vertical rectangular vent at the lower rear, with several narrow horizontal slits; no other visible vents.
